costs.title: Costs
costs.description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.percentMonthlyBudget: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.selectDateRange: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
costs.noCostEventsInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costs.noFinanceEventsTimeline: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
costs.noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
costs.inferenceLedgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.byAgentDescription: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDescription: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.byBillerDescription: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costs.financeLedgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.budgetControlPlaneDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costs.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.activeIncidentsInstruction: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.agentBudgetsDescription: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.projectBudgetsDescription: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
